title: Others_ Others - Linear Programming - Theoretical/Not Answered

questions.question:
Consider the following linear programming problem :

\( \max. z = 0.50 x_{2} – 0.10x_{1} \)

Subject to the constraints

\( 2x_{1} + 5x_{2} \leq 80 \)

\( x_{1} + x_{2} \leq 20 \)

and \( x_{1}, x_{2} \geq 0 \) 

The total maximum profit \( (z) \) for the above problem is :



UGC NET CSE | August 2016 | Part 3 | Question: 61
